de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model

Interface IExecutionJoin

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<SourceElement>
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    ExecutionJoin, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessJoin

    public interface IExecutionJoin
extends IExecutionNode<SourceElement>

    A node in the symbolic execution tree which represents a join.

    The default implementation is ExecutionJoin which is instantiated via a SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder instance.

    See Also:
    SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder, ExecutionJoin

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.IExecutionNode

    • Method Detail

      • isWeakeningVerified

        boolean isWeakeningVerified()
        Checks if the weakening is verified.
        Returns:
        true is verified, false is not verified.

      • isWeakeningVerificationSupported

        boolean isWeakeningVerificationSupported()
        Checks if the weakening verification is supported.
        Returns:
        true supported, false not supported.
